descriptions.user_role: Configure default role assignment for new users.
descriptions.credit: Configure initial credits and daily free credits.
descriptions.ai_model_catalog: Configure visible image models, provider mapping, display metadata, and credit costs.
descriptions.google_analytics: Configure Google Analytics settings.

app_description.title: App Description
app_description.placeholder: Seedance 2.5 is an AI creative suite for images, video, and voice.

initial_role_enabled.title: Initial Role Enabled
initial_role_enabled.tip: Whether to assign an initial role to new users.

initial_role_name.title: Initial Role
initial_role_name.tip: The initial role for new users.

initial_credits_enabled.title: Initial Credits Enabled
initial_credits_enabled.tip: Whether to grant initial credits to new users.

initial_credits_amount.title: Initial Credits Amount
initial_credits_amount.tip: Initial credits amount for new users.

initial_credits_valid_days.title: Initial Credits Valid Days
initial_credits_valid_days.tip: Initial credits expire after this many days.

daily_credits_enabled.title: Daily Credits Enabled
daily_credits_enabled.tip: Whether to grant free credits once per user, device, or IP each day.

daily_credits_valid_days.title: Daily Credits Valid Days
daily_credits_valid_days.tip: Daily free credits expire after this many days.

daily_credits_blocked_countries.title: Daily Credits Blocked Countries
daily_credits_blocked_countries.tip: Comma-separated country codes that should not receive daily free credits.

email_verification_enabled.title: Email Verification Required
email_verification_enabled.tip: Require users to verify their email before they can sign in. Requires a configured email provider such as Resend.

select_payment_enabled.title: Select Payment Method Enabled
select_payment_enabled.tip: Allow users to select a payment method. If disabled, the default payment provider is used.

pay_as_you_go_enabled.title: Show Pay as you go
pay_as_you_go_enabled.tip: Show one-time credit packages on the public pricing page.

default_payment_provider.title: Default Payment Provider
default_payment_provider.tip: Choose the default payment provider to use.

stripe_signing_secret.title: Stripe Signing Secret
stripe_signing_secret.tip: Stripe Signing Secret is used to verify webhook notifications from Stripe.

stripe_payment_methods.title: Stripe Payment Methods
stripe_payment_methods.tip: If not set, only card payments are enabled.

stripe_promotion_codes.title: Stripe Promotion Codes
stripe_promotion_codes.tip: Map product_id values in the pricing table to promotion_code values created in Stripe. Must be a valid JSON object.

stripe_allow_promotion_codes.title: Stripe Allow Promotion Codes
stripe_allow_promotion_codes.tip: Whether users can enter custom promotion codes. Only works when no preset promotion code is provided.

creem_signing_secret.title: Creem Signing Secret
creem_signing_secret.tip: Creem Signing Secret is used to verify webhook notifications from Creem.

creem_product_ids.title: Creem Product IDs Mapping
creem_product_ids.tip: Keys come from product_id values in src/config/locale/en/pages/pricing.json. Values are payment_product_id values copied from Creem Products. Must be a valid JSON object.

paypal_webhook_id.title: PayPal Webhook ID
paypal_webhook_id.tip: PayPal Webhook ID is used to verify webhook notifications from PayPal. You can find it in PayPal Developer Dashboard > Webhooks.

plausible_script_id.title: Plausible ID
plausible_script_id.tip: Use the pa-xxxx ID from your Plausible snippet.

bing_indexnow_key.title: Bing IndexNow Key
bing_indexnow_key.tip: Builds generate public/<key>.txt with the key as its file content.

r2_upload_path.title: Upload Path
r2_upload_path.tip: The upload path for files. Leave empty to use the default upload path. Example: uploads/foo/bar.

r2_endpoint.title: Endpoint
r2_endpoint.tip: Leave empty to use the default R2 endpoint.

openrouter_base_url.title: OpenRouter Base URL
openrouter_base_url.tip: Set any OpenAI compatible API URL. Leave empty to use the default OpenRouter API URL.

replicate_custom_storage.title: Replicate Custom Storage
replicate_custom_storage.tip: Use custom storage to save files generated by Replicate.

fal_api_key.title: Fal API Key
fal_api_key.tip: Fal API Key is used to access the Fal API.

fal_custom_storage.title: Fal Custom Storage
fal_custom_storage.tip: Use custom storage to save files generated by Fal.

kie_api_key.title: Kie API Key
kie_api_key.tip: Kie API Key is used to access the Kie API.

kie_custom_storage.title: Kie Custom Storage
kie_custom_storage.tip: Use custom storage to save files generated by Kie.

pro_feature_plan_names.title: Pro Feature Plan Names
pro_feature_plan_names.tip: Comma-separated active subscription plan names or product ids allowed to use Pro-only AI features such as 4K output.

ai_image_model_catalog.title: Image Model Catalog
ai_image_model_catalog.tip: Editable JSON used by the generator and server-side credit calculation. Prefer the visual editor above this field on the AI settings page.

affonso_cookie_duration.title: Affonso Cookie Duration
affonso_cookie_duration.tip: Affonso cookie duration in days. Default is 30 days.

ai_model_catalog.title: AI Model Catalog
ai_model_catalog.description: Control which image models appear in the generator, which provider each model uses, and how many credits each mode costs.
ai_model_catalog.runtime_notice: Saved changes take effect through runtime settings. No frontend deploy needed.

fields.mode_model_hint: This mode can use its own provider model ID.

messages.save_failed: Failed to save AI model catalog

validation.model_required: Model {row}: provider model ID is required
validation.scene_required: Model {row}: select at least one mode
validation.unique_required: Model {row}: provider, model ID, and mode must be unique

labels.replace_image: Upload a new image to replace
